summary: Initial nametag/name-entry analysis pass that replaced several address-style mnName and gmMainLib symbols with semantic names, updated declarations and callsites, and clarified menu input helper naming. The PR author stated they were "Pretty confident in these names" but left room for future adjustment. Evidence is mostly from symbol/header/callsite renames; no review comments were present.
what_changed: Renamed gmMainLib_8015CC9C to GetPersistentNameData in symbols, implementation, and header.
Renamed gmMainLib_8015EF84 to InitializePersistentNameData in symbols and header declaration.
Renamed mnName_8023754C to GetNameText and propagated the new name through mnname.h, mnname.c decomp stubs, character select, and nametag display code.
Renamed mnName_80237594 to GetNameCount, mnName_802375EC to CanCreateNewName, mnName_802379BC to IsNameValid, and mnName_80237A04 to CreateNameAtIndex in symbols and mnname declarations/stubs.
Changed the menu input inline Menu_GetEvents to Menu_GetAllEvents to reflect that it calls mn_80229624(4), and added Menu_GetEventsForPort(s32 i) for explicit per-port input polling.
Updated existing menu screens that were using the all-controller helper to call Menu_GetAllEvents: deflicker, hyaku, language, sound, and sound test.
Added a gm_1A36.static.h todo noting that mn_80229624(4) indexing gm_80479C30[4] may imply controller_union belongs as part of the controller map array.
Reformatted one nametag text recreation call in un_2FC9.c while switching it from mnName_8023754C to GetNameText.
smart_moves: Renames were applied consistently across config/GALE01/symbols.txt, C implementations, headers, and downstream callsites, keeping symbol map and source declarations aligned.
The GetNameText name is supported by its observed use as the string argument passed to HSD_SisLib_803A6B98 when creating nametag SIS text.

Separating Menu_GetAllEvents from Menu_GetEventsForPort preserved the existing behavior for callers using mn_80229624(4) while documenting the difference between aggregate/all-port and per-port input.
Leaving explicit @todo notes around uncertain structure interpretation avoided overcommitting to a speculative controller array layout while preserving the observation for later analysis.
The PR kept unknown function signatures as UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS where only behavior-level names were inferred, avoiding premature type claims.
decomp_lessons: When a function's role is inferred from callsites, propagate the semantic name through symbols, headers, decomp stub comments, and all callers in one small PR to avoid mixed address-style and semantic references.
Name menu helpers by the exact behavioral distinction visible at the callsite; here mn_80229624(4) was treated as all-events input, while mn_80229624(i) became a per-port helper.
If an index appears to run one past a declared array, record the layout suspicion near the static data rather than silently resizing or renaming the structure without proof.
For early analysis PRs, semantic names can improve searchability even before full decompilation, but uncertainty should be signaled with comments or author caveats.
Nametag/name-entry work crosses mn, gm, and un systems: persistent name storage, menu name management, and in-match nametag SIS rendering should be kept synchronized.
naming_conventions: Address-style names such as mnName_8023754C were replaced with PascalCase action/query names: GetNameText, GetNameCount, CanCreateNewName, IsNameValid, CreateNameAtIndex.
Persistent name-storage functions in gmMainLib were named with explicit PersistentNameData terminology: GetPersistentNameData and InitializePersistentNameData.
Menu input inline names use a Menu_ prefix and distinguish aggregate versus indexed behavior: Menu_GetAllEvents and Menu_GetEventsForPort.
Menu event enum entries retain the MenuEvent_ prefix, with an added todo questioning whether the enum type should eventually be renamed to MenuInput.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No explicit assembly matching trick was documented in comments or review.
The inline split appears designed to preserve generated behavior while making the constant argument mn_80229624(4) versus variable argument mn_80229624(i) semantically explicit.

The gm_1A36.static.h todo records a data-layout clue from code behavior: mn_80229624() receiving 4 and indexing gm_80479C30[4] may indicate controller_union is logically contiguous with the gm_controller_map array.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
The only human explanatory text from the author was: "Pretty confident in these names in my initial analysis, can be tweaked later of course."
follow_up_queries: Check later PRs for whether GetNameText/GetNameCount/CanCreateNewName/IsNameValid/CreateNameAtIndex signatures were refined from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
Search for future resolution of the gm_80479C30[4] and controller_union layout todo in gm_1A36.static.h.
Search whether MenuEvent or MenuInput naming was revisited after the todo in src/melee/mn/inlines.h.
Look for later full decompilation of mnname.c functions around 0x8023754C-0x80237A04.
Verify whether InitializePersistentNameData receives a concrete signature in later gmmain_lib work.
